name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.73: merges gravity fridge support and the on-site downloads page onto the v5.72 receipts line (both features were built on a parallel branch and were not in v5.72). Fridge: per-basket planogram block in config for GR- models, POST machines/:deviceCode/fridge/settlement (idempotent, report-only, recomputes and flags mismatches), admin basket/settlement endpoints. Downloads: shared-key-gated /downloads page listing installable app packages, ag-admin managed registry. Receipts, drafts, aliases and cost-price features from v5.72 are unchanged. Cumulative over v5.72.
